distinctive_elements: 3D polygon-based racing without textures (except scenery in PC version)
instant replay system with adjustable camera settings
automatic camera position changes during action replays
accurate track modelling with recognizable real-world circuits
ideal line display for driving assistance

sources_used: wikipedia - Formula One Grand Prix (video game)
notes: T2 tier data - Racing simulator with 3D polygon graphics. Source documentation focuses on gameplay mechanics and historical impact rather than visual design specifications. No sprite dimensions, color palette data, tile vocabulary, or animation frame counts are documented in available sources.
